description: Centered placeholder shown when a list or section has no content, with optional icon, title, description, and call-to-action button.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Heading shown in the empty state.

parameters.name: ActionText
parameters.description: Label for the call-to-action button. Button is rendered only when this is set and OnAction has a delegate.

parameters.name: OnAction
parameters.description: Fires when the action button is clicked.

examples.title: Empty state with action
examples.code:
<TmEmptyState Title="No results found"
              Description="Try adjusting your filters or search terms."
              Icon="search"
              ActionText="Clear Filters"
              OnAction="ClearFilters" />
